description: Lists recent messages in a Teams channel (Graph GET .../messages). Responses include @odata.nextLink when paginated—pass it back as odata_next_link. On continuation requests, team_id and channel_id are optional (they are already in odata_next_link).

team_id.description: Team (group) id from teams_list_teams or teams_search_teams. Required on the first page unless odata_next_link is set.

channel_id.description: Channel id from teams_list_channels. Required on the first page unless odata_next_link is set.

odata_next_link.description: Pagination: copy the full @odata.nextLink value from the previous response body (verbatim).

top.description: First-page page size ($top). Ignored when odata_next_link is provided. Graph default is 20; max 50 per page.
